steps.title: Follow critique then response
steps.content: The text first gives Deshpande's critique: Eurocentric social-science concepts had little relevance for India. It then explains his proposed response: categories based on India's cultural and ecological circumstances, such as the communalist Indian village model.

steps.title: Rule out absent structures
steps.content: A adds training and policies he oversaw. B adds influence on other scholars. D centers an influential economic theory and its relative importance. None matches the critique-plus-response pattern. The answer is C.
